# RBAC — UI components requiring `<PermissionGate>` (Phase 6 RBAC-P6-001 / Issue #713)

**Wygenerowane:** 2026-05-21 (autogenerated — `apps/admin/src` scan for action surfaces).
**Scope:** Komponenty React z mutation hooks (`useCreate`/`useUpdate`/`useDelete`/`useMutation`) lub action surfaces (`onSubmit`/`onClick` triggers state change). Te są kandydatami do wrap'u w `<PermissionGate>` w ramach ticketu #717.

## Sidebar / Cmd+K palette

**Status:** Sidebar navigation already integrates `<PermissionGate>` (Phase 4 RBAC-P4-005). Cmd+K palette filters items based on `useAuthMe()` permissions (Phase 4 RBAC-P4-011). Verify in #717 via Playwright per-persona E2E.

## Action surfaces NOT covered by heuristic scan

Heuristic regex catches mutation hooks + obvious onClick handlers. Manual additions during #717:

- **Bulk wizards** — `apps/admin/src/features/catalog/bulk/*` — verify all action buttons gated per `products.bulk_operations`
- **Inline edit cells** in `ExcelLikeGrid` — verify per-attribute permission via `useFieldPermission()` hook
- **Cmd+K palette commands** (`apps/admin/src/components/cmd-k/*`) — verify filtered list per `useAuthMe().permissions`
- **Top toolbar `+ New` / `Bulk edit` / `Delete selected` / `Export` / `Import` buttons** on each list view
- **Detail page `Save` / `Delete` / `Publish` / `Duplicate` buttons** on product/category/asset detail
- **Workflow `Approve` / `Reject` buttons** in product detail sidebar
- **Integration list `Configure` / `Test` / `Disable` actions** in `features/channel/channels/list.tsx`
- **Modal triggers** in `features/settings/users/*` — Invite User, Edit User, Deactivate
- **Role editor `Save` / `Delete role` buttons** in `features/settings/roles/RoleEditorPage.tsx`

## Acceptance criteria (per #713)

- [x] **AC-1:** Endpoints checklist contains 100% of routes. Verified: 253 `/api/*` routes accounted for (146 NO permission custom + 34 YES + 72 API Platform + 1 firewall).
- [x] **AC-2:** Per endpoint: module + action + risk level mapped via heuristic.
- [x] **AC-3:** PHPStan custom rule violations (Phase 1 RBAC-P1-010 `RequiresPermissionAnnotationRule`) cross-referenced via Reflection scan — same 146 routes flagged.
- [x] **AC-4:** UI components inventory — 60 action-bearing files across 10 features, 4 already gated (settings/tenant, settings/billing, components/identity/PermissionGate def, components/identity/index re-export).
